name: Poppyseed Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat eggs in a large bowl.
3. Blend in apple juice concentrate, melted butter, lemon peel, lemon juice, and vanilla extract.
4. Combine flour, poppy seeds, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture, beating until well blended.
6. Pour the batter evenly into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake for 20 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean and the edges are golden brown.
8. Cool on a wire rack. Serve warm or at room temperature.
